channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Kotlin (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Kotlin nel periodo weekly.

item.title: 📝 iampedii/WhiteDNS (316 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: iampedii

📝 Repository: iampedii/WhiteDNS

📄 Descrizione: Source-available Android DNS tunneling client with VPN and proxy modes, backed by MasterDNS & StormDNS.

⭐ Stelle: 316

🍴 Forks: 16

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: vpn vpn-client

📜 Licenza: Other

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-10T05:27:42Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-12T05:33:30Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 skydoves/compose-animations (178 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: skydoves

📝 Repository: skydoves/compose-animations

📄 Descrizione: ⚡️ A collection of Jetpack Compose animations for the best practices. Tweak literals at the top of any file, save, and watch the motion morph in real-time.

⭐ Stelle: 178

🍴 Forks: 6

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: android animations compose compose-hotswan compose-ui hot-reload hotswan jetpack jetpack-compose skydoves

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-05T01:15:59Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-11T03:38:19Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 Hidden-Node/GooseRelayVPN-AndroidClient (39 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Hidden-Node

📝 Repository: Hidden-Node/GooseRelayVPN-AndroidClient

📄 Descrizione: GooseRelayVPN Android client: a SOCKS5 VPN with profile-based setup, live logs, and JSON import/export that tunnels raw TCP through Google Apps Script to your VPS exit server (AES-256-GCM, domain-fronted).

⭐ Stelle: 39

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: aes-gcm http-proxy mitm proxy sni socks5 tunnel tunneling vpn vpn-client

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-28T22:33:54Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-01T04:42:48Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

👤 Owner: ericmigi

📝 Repository: ericmigi/Notes-Of-Fruit

📄 Descrizione: Android client for iCloud Notes — CRDT-correct write path, deferred-create FAB, format-preserving splice. Reverse-engineered Apple Notes topotext over CloudKit.

⭐ Stelle: 21

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-29T04:19:10Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-01T17:16:57Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 RytterMohn/EnvScope (20 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: RytterMohn

📝 Repository: RytterMohn/EnvScope

📄 Descrizione: EnvScope 是一个用于 Android 运行环境自检的 APK，重点探测 Frida、Xposed、LSPosed、EdXposed、Substrate、Riru、Zygisk/Magisk 等动态插桩、Hook 或模块化注入痕迹。 项目同时实现 Kotlin 层与 Native C++ 层检测。Kotlin 层负责包名、类加载、调用栈、环境变量、系统属性、端口、进程、挂载表等检查；Native 层负责已加载 so、导出符号、`/proc`、线程名、socket 和 `TracerPid` 的交叉检查。

⭐ Stelle: 20

🍴 Forks: 6

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-04T07:40:36Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-10T00:37:11Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
